owner_operator_stated: Practice is legally 'Jason Hong, DDS & Kathy Lam, DDS PC,' branded publicly as Clarendon Hills Dental; site's meet-the-dentist page profiles Dr. Jason Hong as the practice leader, and Kathy Lam DDS is named as co-owner in the corporate/site title.
notes: Address (53 E Ogden Ave, Clarendon Hills, IL 60514) and phone (630-789-1555) both match exactly on the practice's own site. Single-location independent practice, not a DSO or multi-location group. No careers/hiring page found on the pages checked.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Julio Argueta is the named dentist matching the record's legal entity 'Argueta Dental, PC'; site brands publicly as 'Ogden Dental Studio.'
notes: Address (518 Ogden Ave, Downers Grove, IL 60515) and phone (630-271-0300) match exactly. Site also lists dental hygienist Claire Doane. Locally owned single-location practice, not a DSO. No careers/hiring page found.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Yosif Jabir, DDS, MBA is confirmed practicing at this exact address/phone, matching the record's named entity 'Yosif Jabir DDS PC.' His bio page does not explicitly state whether he owns the practice/group or is an associate; the brand has expanded to a 2-location group ('White Oak Family Dental,' Downers Grove + Naperville) with additional dentists McGrath and Nguyen.
notes: Address (1121 Warren Ave, Suite 130, Downers Grove, IL) and phone (630-663-0554) match exactly. The vendor hint domain 'websterdds.com' now redirects/rebrands to this same White Oak Family Dental site (historically 'Webster Dental,' Barbara Webster DDS) — the location has transitioned from a solo/legacy brand to a multi-doctor, multi-location group (Downers Grove + Naperville) that now includes Dr. Jabir. Not flagged as an ownership conflict because the record's named dentist (Jabir) is himself confirmed practicing at the address, not replaced by an unrelated party. No careers/hiring page found on pages checked.

owner_operator_stated: Sara Banuelos, DDS is the practice owner, matching the record's legal entity 'Sara Banuelos D.D.S SC.'
notes: Address (3800 Highland Ave, Unit 108, Downers Grove, IL 60515) and phone (630-241-0666) match exactly. The vendor_website_hint 'Wshs-Dg.Org' appears unrelated to this dental practice (reads like a school-district domain) and was not corroborated by any search result; the real, corroborated site is sarabanuelosdental.com. owner_operator_stated: Dr. William Kats, DDS took over the practice in 1998 after working as an associate dentist, per downtowndg.org's business profile; matches the record's legal entity 'Tower Dental Associates PC.'
notes: Address (5155 Mochel Dr, Downers Grove, IL 60515) and phone (630-968-1544) match on the practice's own contact page (search-result snippet; direct fetch of towerdental.net returned HTTP 403 anti-bot block, but page titles/content were visible in search results). No dedicated careers page was found on towerdental.net itself, but current, specific job openings (front office, hygienist, hygiene assistant) are actively posted on Indeed/Glassdoor/BeBee under the Tower Dental Associates name at this Downers Grove location. Multi-doctor group practice (4 dentists incl. a periodontist), independently owned per downtowndg.org, not a DSO brand.

owner_operator_stated: The site states Marcia Basciano, DDS (the record's named entity, 'Basciano and Associates') is the FORMER owner of this location; Dr. Arif Samee and Dr. Robert K. Peterson 're-opened the doors to patients' in 2019 under the new name 'Main Street Square Dental.'
notes: SUCCESSOR CONFLICT: the address (2932 Finley Rd, Downers Grove, IL 60515) and phone ((630) 629-6299) now belong to 'Main Street Square Dental,' operated by Dr. Arif Samee and Dr. Robert K. Peterson since 2019; dentalwellnesschicago.com explicitly names Marcia Basciano, DDS as the FORMER owner. Stale third-party directories (Yelp, Healthgrades, NPI profile) still list 'Basciano & Associates, DDS' / 'Marcia A Basciano, DDS' as if active at this address, but the practice's own corroborated site confirms the entity has changed hands and rebranded. No usable careers info for the named entity since it no longer operates here.
